Research

Research interests

  • GenAI for modeling human decision-making (digital twins, personalized behavioral interventions)
  • GenAI for psychometric research (responsibly generating experimental stimuli and scale items)
  • System modeling (social / environmental shocks and human behavior, policy evaluation)

Preprints and papers in progress (R&R, under consideration, and in preparation)
